_comment: Slice 412 contract-tier golden. PROVIDER: internal/api/controlstate/handler_contract_test.go (Effectiveness, real handler over an injected fixed-row two-method controlEvaluator stub — per-route Option-A seam, no eval.Engine/Postgres).
